query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `bupa_prerequisite_codes` (
  `id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
  `bupa_prerequisite_id` int NOT NULL,
  `icd_code_id` int NOT NULL,
  `created_at` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  PRIMARY KEY (`id`),
  FOREIGN KEY (`bupa_prerequisite_id`) REFERENCES `bupa_prerequisites`(`id`) ON DELETE CASCADE ON UPDATE CASCADE,
  FOREIGN KEY (`icd_code_id`) REFERENCES `icd_codes`(`id`) ON DELETE CASCADE ON UPDATE CASCADE,
  INDEX `idx_bupa_prereq_id` (`bupa_prerequisite_id`),
  INDEX `idx_bupa_icd_code_id` (`icd_code_id`)
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `bupa_code_branches` (
  `id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
  `bupa_code_id` int NOT NULL,
  `icd_branch_id` int NOT NULL,
  `created_at` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  PRIMARY KEY (`id`),
  FOREIGN KEY (`bupa_code_id`) REFERENCES `bupa_prerequisite_codes`(`id`) ON DELETE CASCADE ON UPDATE CASCADE,
  FOREIGN KEY (`icd_branch_id`) REFERENCES `icd_branches`(`id`) ON DELETE CASCADE ON UPDATE CASCADE,
  INDEX `idx_bupa_code_branch_bupa_code` (`bupa_code_id`),
  INDEX `idx_bupa_code_branch_icd_branch` (`icd_branch_id`)
);

  INDEX `idx_bupa_prereq_id` (`bupa_prerequisite_id`),

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `bupa_code_branches` (
  `id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
  `bupa_code_id` int NOT NULL,
  `icd_branch_id` int NOT NULL,

  INDEX `idx_bupa_code_branch_bupa_code` (`bupa_code_id`),
  INDEX `idx_bupa_code_branch_icd_branch` (`icd_branch_id`)
);
